title: ShadowStrik3r PvP modpack
description: A lightweight PvP-oriented modpack perfect for both competitive fights and SMP servers. Balanced gameplay, smooth performance, and quality-of-life improvements ensure a clean and enjoyable combat experience.
body:
A lightweight and highly optimized Minecraft 1.21.1 Fabric PvP modpack built for players who value speed, precision, and pure skill.

This modpack is carefully tuned to deliver:

🚀 Maximum FPS & low latency (Fabric + performance mods)

⚔️ Smooth, responsive PvP combat

🧠 Clean UI and better visibility for fights

🌍 Fully compatible with multiplayer servers

🛠️ Balanced gameplay without breaking vanilla mechanics

Designed for duels, SMP wars, practice fights, and competitive servers, this pack removes unnecessary mods and focuses only on what matters in PvP—performance, clarity, and consistency.

Whether you’re a casual fighter or a serious PvP grinder, this modpack gives you a fair edge while keeping the game clean and server-friendly.
